title: ExecutionRecord
description: A single row in the execution history (`state_executions`). One record per action or audit invocation — regardless of whether the runner was CLI, Skill, or in-process.

extensionId.description: Id of the action or audit that ran (e.g. `skill-summarizer`, `validate-all`).

extensionVersion.description: Semver of the extension implementation at execution time.

nodeIds.description: Target `node.path` values. Empty for audits that evaluate the whole graph.

contentHash.description: Duplicate-prevention hash used at submit time: sha256(actionId + actionVersion + bodyHash + frontmatterHash + promptTemplateHash). Null for audits.

status.description: Terminal status. History never stores `queued` or `running` — those live in `state_jobs` until they reach a terminal state.

failureReason.description: Normalized reason when `status = failed` or `cancelled`. Null for `completed`.

exitCode.description: Subprocess exit code for CLI-runner executions. Null for in-process or Skill-runner executions.

runner.description: Which runner executed this job. Null for audits.

durationMs.description: Finished - started. Stored denormalized for query speed.

tokensIn.description: Input tokens reported by the runner. Null if not applicable or not reported.

tokensOut.description: Output tokens reported by the runner.

reportPath.description: Path to the written report, relative to scope root. Null for actions that don't produce a report file.

jobId.description: Originating job id when applicable. Null for audits and in-process actions.
